transcript: Speaker A: Excuse me... Could I please get a glass of water? Speaker B: Of course sir, I'll get that right away. Speaker A: पूर्वी ही लाईन बोलताना माझे हात थरथरायचे. लोक म्हणायचे तू आयुष्यभर बैलगाडीच चालवशील. इंग्लिश तुझ्या बसची गोष्ट नाही. पण आज बघा... मी फ्लाईट मध्ये बसून जगभर फिरतोय. मी कोणतीही महाग कोचिंग केलेली नाही. मी फक्त MySivi ॲप वर रोज इंग्लिश बोलायची प्रॅक्टिस केली. इथे AI टीचर सोबत रियल-लाईफ कॉन्वर्सेशन्सची प्रॅक्टिस करता येते आणि सेन्टेन्स व प्रोनाउन्शिएशनच्या चुका लगेच करेक्ट होतात. फक्त दररोज १०-१५ मिनिटे बोलून प्रॅक्टिस करा, हळूहळू इंग्लिश बोलण्याचा कॉन्फिडन्स आपोआप वाढतो. म्हणून आजच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड करा आणि इंग्लिश बोलायला सुरुवात करा. [Speaker A: Excuse me... Could I please get a glass of water? Speaker B: Of course sir, I'll get that right away. Speaker A: Earlier, my hands used to shake while saying this line. People used to say you will drive a bullock cart all your life. English is not your cup of tea. But look today... I am sitting in a flight and traveling the world. I didn't do any expensive coaching. I just practiced speaking English daily on the MySivi app. Here, you can practice real-life conversations with an AI teacher, and sentence and pronunciation mistakes are corrected instantly. Just practice speaking for 10-15 minutes daily, and gradually your confidence to speak English will increase automatically. So download the MySivi app today and start speaking English.]

summary: An elderly man confidently orders water in English on a flight, sharing how he overcame past ridicule and learned English without expensive coaching. He attributes his success to practicing 10-15 minutes daily with the MySivi app's AI teacher and urges viewers to download it.
